backstory.original: Talin Uran is a rogue of great renown within Waterdeep. While on an assignment with the Grambar's Blades a few years ago, he was caught in a building collapse which left him paralysed from the waist down. Now equipped with his combat wheelchair, Talin is back to doing what he does best: Saving the day and looking awesome doing it.
backstory.display: 塔林·乌兰是深水城里名气很大的游荡者。几年前，他在为葛兰巴之刃执行任务时，被卷入一场建筑坍塌事故，导致他腰部以下瘫痪。如今塔林装备了战斗轮椅，重新开始做他最擅长的事情：拯救世界的同时保持炫酷。

description.original: Talin disappears into the shadows and stabs a random enemy with his rapier.
description.display: 塔林消失在阴影中，然后用西洋剑刺向一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Talin disappears into the shadows and reappears behind a random enemy, stabbing them with his rapier. He then shadowsteps back into the formation.
longDescription.display: 塔林消失在阴影中，重新出现在一名随机敌人身后，然后用他的西洋剑发动刺杀。随后他会用暗影步回到阵型中。

description.original: Talin throws a hoop blade in a large looping arc, damaging all enemies it encounters before returning to Talin.
description.display: 塔林扔出轮形飞刃，划出一个大圆弧，对遭遇的所有敌人造成伤害，随后回到塔林手中。

longDescription.original: Talin detaches a secondary hoop-shaped blade from his wheelchair's rear wheel and flings it at the farthest enemy. It travels in a large looping arc, damaging all enemies it encounters before returning to Talin.
longDescription.display: 塔林扔出轮椅后轮上的次要轮形飞刃，让其飞向最远处的敌人。脉轮会划出一个大圆弧，对遭遇的所有敌人造成伤害，随后回到塔林手中。

description.original: Talin scatters tacks where he attacks monsters, the tacks stay behind and slow monsters in the area.
description.display: 塔林在攻击怪物时会播撒图钉，留下的图钉会减速该区域的怪物。

description.original: Talin debuffs Evil Champions , but buffs Good Chamions based on the number of Evil Champions.
description.display: 塔林对邪恶阵营勇士造成减益，但会根据邪恶阵营勇士的数量为善良阵营勇士提供增益。

conditions.desc: When Talin attacks with Quiet Ambush he leaves behind a set of Scatter Tacks which cause enemies standing on them to be slowed by 75% and take $(amount)% more damage from attacks.
When Talin attacks with Quiet Ambush he leaves behind a set of Scatter Tacks which cause enemies standing on them to be slowed by 50% and take $(amount)% more damage from attacks.
塔林使用无声伏击攻击敌人时，会在身后留下一组播撒图钉，使踩在上面的敌人被减速 75%，并且受到的伤害提升 $(amount)%
塔林使用无声伏击攻击敌人时，会在身后留下一组播撒图钉，使踩在上面的敌人被减速 50%，并且受到的伤害提升 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Talin scatters tacks behind him after attacking, slowing enemies that walk in that area.
tipText.display: 塔林发动攻击后播撒图钉，使走过该区域的敌人减速。

description.pre: Talin increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)%. This ability is increased by $(amount_per_stack)% for each enemy killed in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $(talin_weakness_max_stacks) kills. The effect is reduced by $(reduction_per_slot)% for each slot past one a given Champion is away from Talin(stacking multiplicatively).
塔林提升所有勇士 $(amount)% 伤害。当前区域内每有一名敌人被击杀，此技能效果提升 $(amount_per_stack)%。以乘算方式堆叠，最多计算 $(talin_weakness_max_stacks) 次击杀。特定勇士距离塔林每远一格，此效果就减少 $(reduction_per_slot)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。

tipText.original: Talin observes weaknesses of enemies and whispers them to nearby Champions increasing their damage.
tipText.display: 塔林观察到敌人的弱点，并低声告诉附近的勇士，以提高他们的伤害。

conditions.desc: Talin decreases the DPS of Good Champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, but increases the damage of Evil Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good Champion, stacking multiplicatively.

Talin decreases the DPS of Evil Champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, but increases the damage of Good Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Evil Champion, stacking multiplicatively.
塔林使阵型中所有善良阵营勇士的伤害输出降低 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，但阵型中每有一名善良阵营的勇士，都会提升所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。
塔林使阵型中所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害输出降低 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，但阵型中每有一名邪恶阵营的勇士，都会提升所有善良阵营勇士的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。

description.desc: Increases the stack cap and damage buff of Spot Weakness by $(amount)%.
提升洞察弱点的层数堆叠上限和伤害加成 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Talin focuses on enemy weaknesses, increasing the damage of nearby Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 塔林专注于敌人的弱点，提高附近勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the slow effect, radius, and damage of Scatter Tacks by $(amount)% (multiplicatively).
提升播撒图钉的减速效果、半径和伤害 $(amount)%（乘算）

specializationDescription.original: Talin focuses on scattering tacks, slowing more monsters.
specializationDescription.display: 塔林专注于播撒图钉，使更多怪物减速。

description.desc: Reverse the effect of Antagonist, decreasing the damage of Good Champions and increasing the damage of Evil Champions based on the number of Good Champions.
反转此消彼长的效果，降低善良阵营勇士的伤害，并基于阵型中善良阵营勇士的数量，提升邪恶阵营勇士的伤害

specializationDescription.original: Talin prefers the company of Evil, increasing the damage of Evil Champions at a cost to Good Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 塔林更喜欢与邪恶为伍，牺牲善良勇士的输出，使邪恶勇士的伤害提高。

description.original: Follow my tracks, I'll show you the way.
description.display: 跟随我的脚步，我会给你指路。

description.original: I am many things. A quitter is not one of them.
description.display: 我有很多特点，但轻言放弃绝不是其中之一。

description.original: They're favoring their right side. Strike them there.
description.display: 他们习惯用右侧，就从那里攻击他们。

description.original: Flip the table and dive out of the way. I've got them lined up.
description.display: 掀翻桌子跳开。我已经让他们排好队了。

description.original: Now THOSE are some scatter tacks!
description.display: 这样的播撒图钉才像样嘛！

effects.description: Increases the radius of Talin's Scatter Tacks by 50%.

description.original: Watch when they come in the room.
description.display: 且看他们进入房间后的下场吧。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Talin Uran is a rogue of great renown within Waterdeep. While on an assignment with the Grambar's Blades a few years ago, he was caught in a building collapse which left him paralysed from the waist down. Now equipped with his combat wheelchair, Talin is back to doing what he does best: Saving the day and looking awesome doing it.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Talin buffs other Champions damage based on proximity and alignment, and slows enemies in the areas he attacks

event_upgrades.name: Scatter Tacks
event_upgrades.description: Talin scatters tacks where he attacks monsters, the tacks stay behind and slow monsters in the area.

event_upgrades.name: Antagonist
event_upgrades.description: Talin debuffs Evil Champions , but buffs Good Chamions based on the number of Evil Champions.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 塔林·乌兰是深水城里名气很大的游荡者。几年前，他在为葛兰巴之刃执行任务时，被卷入一场建筑坍塌事故，导致他腰部以下瘫痪。如今塔林装备了战斗轮椅，重新开始做他最擅长的事情：拯救世界的同时保持炫酷。
